title: Distributed In-Memory Cache Service
architecture: Decentralized consensus cluster using Raft Protocol, peer-to-peer gossip discovery, and an LRU cache engine with TTL eviction.
problem: High-latency page renders and database CPU bottlenecks during flash sale write-spikes.
solution: Built a Golang-based distributed cache service supporting sub-millisecond lookups, cluster auto-discovery, and eventual consistency sync.
challenges: Handling split-brain consensus failures and re-balancing key hashes upon dynamic node terminations.
lessonsLearned: Learned the trade-offs between linearizability and availability in high-throughput network programming.
futureImprovements: Plan to add a WebAssembly admin dashboard and support hot-swapping consistency profiles.

title: Enterprise E-Signature Platform
architecture: A secure monorepo comprising an Express/PostgreSQL API, a Redis/Bull queue processing system, a React document portal, and PDF cryptographic signing filters.
problem: Manual document signing bottlenecks and high licensing fees for third-party e-signature services.
solution: Engineered a secure, in-house cryptographic document signing portal using @signpdf/signpdf and pdf-lib. Fully integrated digital agreement checkouts and mapped signed PDFs to custom Google Drive backups.
challenges: Mitigating API network timeouts and duplicate PDF uploads during peak checkout periods, resolved by building duplicate validation checks and retry hooks.
lessonsLearned: Deepened understanding of asymmetric cryptography, PDF binary streams modifications, and OAuth2 security guidelines.
futureImprovements: Add support for multi-recipient workflow stages and implement hardware security modules (HSM) for signing keys.

title: Event Automation & API Sync Engine
architecture: Event-driven integration engine caching Event Espresso course registrations in SQL, triggering Twilio SMS reminders, and fetching student completion certificates from Adobe Captivate APIs.
problem: High administrative overhead of manually tracking course completions, scheduling reminders, and updating student certificates across Adobe and WordPress systems.
solution: Developed a custom sync plugin processing class updates, automated Twilio reminder workflows with replies caching, and a fuzzy scoring matching algorithm for CSV data uploads.
challenges: Optimizing CSV matching speeds and database timeout issues during large class uploads, which was resolved by implementing a dedicated pre-indexed database cache manager.
lessonsLearned: Acquired experience in relational SQL database optimization, caching, and building reliable event-driven notification pipelines.
futureImprovements: Introduce a centralized status dashboard and transition background cron processes to Node.js workers.

title: Motorcycle Safety Academy Custom Platform
architecture: Object-oriented custom WordPress plugin combined with a child theme override layer, custom shortcodes, and Map geolocation APIs.
problem: Default course checkouts and registration forms lacked custom styling, timezone counters, geolocation searches, and role-based redirects.
solution: Built 32 shortcode handlers, secure asynchronous authentication pages, Google Maps distance filters, and optimized checkout pages to minimize drop-off rates.
challenges: Fixing layout delays and user experience drops on mobile viewports due to heavy scroll animations, resolved by disabling mobile animations and refining theme stylesheets.
lessonsLearned: Gained expert familiarity with the WordPress event loop, actions/filters hooks lifecycle, and mobile UI rendering optimization.
futureImprovements: Refactor custom shortcode forms into Gutenberg block modules and port dashboard screens to React.

title: Headless WordPress Rendering Core
architecture: Static-first decoupled rendering client querying a Dockerized WordPress instance via optimized GraphQL schemas, cached at edge CDN worker routes.
problem: Slow page loading speeds and high security exposure on shared hosting WordPress servers.
solution: Designed a Next.js static rendering pipeline querying GraphQL APIs, decreasing load times by 75% and removing public server access interfaces.
challenges: Synchronizing page rebuild triggers instantly when editors publish post changes in the WordPress dashboard.
lessonsLearned: Discovered patterns for mapping standard Gutenberg block layouts into highly semantic dynamic React wrappers.
futureImprovements: Plan to build a custom Gutenberg block plugin that auto-compiles blocks into headless schema queries.
